## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` and `bun run typecheck` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes; `bun test` green
- [ ] Engine changes stay **product-neutral** (no product names in the spine)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
